caption: A man wearing a grey, textured, tall headpiece and black headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a small red bow tie, and tan suspenders. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with the brand "LEE" visible. To the left and right of the man, red and white logos appear on the screen, containing the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking with slight variations in his facial expressions and mouth movements. The camera remains static, capturing him from the chest up as he engages in a conversation.
